title: Hybrid INL + Sort-Split MoE (1.41/1.46 bpb TTT, 15.5MB, 1xH100)
body:
## Summary

Hybrid architecture combining classical GQA attention with INL (Integrator Neuron Layer) error-driven O(n) attention, plus Sort-and-Split MoE routing.

- **1.45 bpb float / 1.56 bpb quantized** on 1×H100
- **14.6 MB** int8+zlib (under 16MB budget)
- **476-508 ms/step** — 1.5-1.7× faster than baseline

### Architecture
```
Layers 0-4: RMSNorm → GQA+RoPE (FlashAttention) → Sort-Split MoE MLP (4 experts, relu²)
Layers 5-8: RMSNorm → INL BetaMu (O(n) cumsum) → Sort-Split MoE MLP (4 experts, relu²)
```


### Key innovations
- **INL BetaMu attention**: error-driven `(x - μ)` replaces QKV, O(n) via causal cumsum — no attention matrix
- **Sort-and-split MoE**: `argsort` + fixed split — fullgraph compatible, all experts always busy, zero waste
- **Hybrid design**: classical attention (layers 0-4) for representation building, INL (layers 5-8) for speed
- **ALiBi positional encoding**: learned slopes per head in INL layers, zero extra params

### Results (1×H100, 10 min)
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| val_bpb (float) | 1.4072 |
| val_bpb (int8+zlib) | 1.4934 |
| Model size (int8+zlib) | 15.5 MB |
| Steps completed | 1181 |
| ms/step | 508 |
| model_dim | 512 |
| num_params | 23.5M |
| SWA checkpoints | 23 |

### Components from
- [Complexity Framework](https://github.com/Complexity-ML/complexity-framework) — Sort-Split MoE routing
- [Homemade INL](https://github.com/Complexity-ML/homemade-inl) — BetaMu error-driven attention
